_comment: Copy this to scorecard_questions.json and replace with YOUR real questions. 'expect_path_contains' lists fragments of the file path/name/folder of a document that SHOULD be retrieved for the query (case-insensitive substring match, ANY match counts). Aim for ~15 questions spanning lookups, one-topic, and broad 'everything about X' asks.

questions.query: IBF programme accreditation AI agents RFP
REPLACE: a short acronym query that should hit a known folder
